title: A Q&A With Olympic Champion Lydia Jacoby
summary: Lydia Jacoby was just 17 years old when she became the first Alaska-born swimmer to earn a medal at the Olympics. The post A Q&A With Olympic Champion Lydia Jacoby appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: Four new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta on April 8
summary: On April 8, YKHC reports four new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta.
